At Glenn and Henriettes Mexican evening, the contestants get competitive when theyre let loose on a pinata, and Tristan and Louise hope to inject love into their dinner party - until Stephen gives them frank feedback on the food

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Birmingham, English teacher Corinne and her partner Dal are the first to host in a series of dinner parties, but their evening takes a strange turn when some of the guests prove to be very outspoken. Builder Jack and girlfriend Georgie manage to get their fellow contestants back on side with their food and hosting, and by the time IT workers James and Adele host, expectations are high

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Dean wants to relive his clubbing days and organises a nostalgic wedding in a London nightclub, while his bride-to-be Sandra, who has been kept waiting nearly a decade for her big day, is hoping for her childhood church, followed by a reception in a castle

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adam is given just three weeks, £14,000 and the help of his best men to give his fiancee Bianca the wedding of her dreams. The pregnant bride-to-be would like a simple, classic day to remember, but Adam has other plans

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: The CEO of a smoothie brand goes undercover in his own company to discover how recent changes in the products have affected both his employees and his customers

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bowlero is a global bowling company with thousands of employees and hundreds of centres. It became a bowling giant almost overnight when it took over AMF and Bowlmor Lanes. Colie Edison created every element of the Bowlero brand. Now she wants to go undercover to find out how the new Bowlero is working for staff and customers. As her alter ego Michelle, who recently lost her job as a court reporter and now wants to find a second career, Colie works as a trainee manager, a lane server, an event host and a trainee facilities manager

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberrys in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros hands. Can Jonathan and Drew raise the roof off of dilapidated, draughty and dingy digs? Andis the couples one-mile radius too small for Drew to work with?Short:Frustrated with only one low offer, Samantha and Justin turn to the twins to transform their compartmentalised house. First up, shipping broker Dan and his partner of 16 years, Pippa, hope that a menu of family favourites will bag them the cash - if Dan does exactly what Pippa tells him to. When glamorous duo Shan and Lauren turn up, Pippa witnesses the beginnings of a beautiful bromance between the men. Romance is in no short supply with the final couple, South Africans Jared and Ian. These lovebirds enjoy nothing better than giving each other zerbits and are more than happy to oblige with a demonstration on their night

programme.desc: Adrian Perkins, the mayor of Shreveport, Louisiana, is in charge of 3,000 employees serving its 200,000 residents. Louisianas third largest city has fallen on hard times with crime and unemployment on the rise. Mayor Perkins wants to change the fortunes of his home town and he thinks going undercover will help. As his alter ego Wayne Oliver, an unemployed steel worker looking for a new career, he works alongside a firefighter, a police officer and a parks maintenance worker to see what life is like working for the city, and gets the chance to meet his community without them knowing that theyre talking to the mayor

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina proves that good vanilla makes all the difference in a recipe. She makes homemade extract and then uses it in her vanilla rum panna cotta, vanilla shortbread hearts, vanilla cream cheese pound cake and white hot chocolate.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: For the very first time on the show, vegan week takes place. Judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood have set three very different challenges to test the remaining bakers - a savoury pastry signature, with no butter involved, a technical with a very unusual ingredient and a spectacular showstopper that in the heat of the tent threatens to lead to catastrophe. Who will keep their cool and win star baker? And who will be meeting their end? As ever, Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding are on hand to lend support to the contestants

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its Danish week, and the bakers face unfamiliar recipes as they battle to impress the judges. Theres a bread challenge signature, where they must demonstrate style as well substance. The last remaining duo have the opportunity to win the money theyve banked earlier in the show to potentially double their winnings, or leaving with nothing. Adil Ray hosts

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton hosts the game show as essential skills teacher Orla, development manager Kelly and events duty officer Ben compete to solve word puzzles to get the chance to spin the wheel and win big money prizes, with a potential jackpot of £50,000

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

But when she is subsequently killed, he makes it his lifes mission to find the perpetrators and take revenge. Thriller, starring Jeff Bridges, Rosanna Arquette, Andy Garcia and Alexandra Paul

programme.title: Donovans Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medics snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero

programme.title: Operation Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: A band of soldiers must battle their way through Nazi territory to rescue a scientist who could help turn the tide of the Second World War. Action adventure, starring Ifan Meredith, Kimberley Hews and Darren Hill

He joins forces with a local Viking tribe and they set out in pursuit of the ferocious beast before it can cause further bloodshed. Sci-fi adventure, starring James Caviezel, Sophia Myles, Jack Huston and John Hurt

While exploring the vessel, one of them is set upon by hordes of mutant cannibals and faces a battle for survival as he tries to remember the purpose of the mission. Sci-fi horror, starring Ben Foster and Dennis Quaid

programme.desc: Earth passes through the tail of a comet, causing everything mechanical to develop a life of its own - as well as a burning desire for vengeance against humanity. Sci-fi thriller, starring Emilio Estevez and Pat Hingle

programme.desc: A hit-man is shattered by the mysterious disappearance of his wife, and when his concern begins to affect his work, he vows to find out whats really going on. However, he soon realises the mystery might be connected to his latest job - and finds the trail leads him to the man at the top of his organisation. Haunting thriller with plenty to keep viewers gripped, starring Donald Sutherland, Francine Racette, David Hemmings and David Warner

programme.desc: In the distant future, humans are living on Mars in cities that resemble those once found on Earth, and are protected from the inhospitable Martian atmosphere by dome-like force-fields. When a massive sandstorm breaks through the dome and destroys Mars New York, those in Mars Los Angeles must figure out how to stop the storm before it wipes them out next. Sci-fi drama, starring Alan Pietruszewski, Jennifer Dorogi and Lane Townsend

programme.title: The Land That Time Forgot (1975)
programme.desc: American and German seamen form an uneasy alliance when they end up stranded on an island inhabited by prehistoric monsters as the First World War rages around them. Luckily, they discover an ancient fuel source, a find which increases their chances of escaping - but their hopes of reaching it in time are slim. Fantasy adventure, starring Doug McClure, John McEnery, Susan Penhaligon and Keith Barron

programme.title: Legend Lowdown

programme.title: The Vengeance of She (1968)
programme.desc: A woman with no memory is drawn into a plot to return the tyrannical ruler of an ancient city to everlasting life. Fantasy adventure, starring Olga Schoberová and John Richardson

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The discovery of an unmapped planet marks the beginning of a life-or-death struggle for the Enterprise, as enigmatic alien General Trelane challenges Kirk to a deadly game. William Shatner and William Campbell star

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve finds a World War Two plane that crashed in the Himalayas, a discovery which may expose his father as a coward

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An elusive band of bank robbers is on the loose, and Hooker is given the chance to put old ghosts to rest when he realises their leaders description matches that of the man who killed his partner five years ago

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A young girl witnesses a violent crime committed by the Mob, putting her life in danger. The Rangers act as bodyguards as well as investigating the murder of a policeman

programme.title: D-Tox (2002)
programme.desc: A bereaved FBI agent turns to alcohol to cope with the unsolved murder of his girlfriend and is sent to an isolated rehab clinic to recuperate. Unfortunately, it soon becomes clear that her killer has followed him and is intent on picking off his fellow patients one by one - forcing him to pull himself together in a bid to prevent more deaths. Thriller, with Sylvester Stallone, Polly Walker, Tom Berenger and Kris Kristofferson

programme.title: Criminal (2016)
programme.desc: A deceased CIA agents secrets, skills and memories are implanted into a death-row inmate in the hope that he will complete an operatives crucial mission. Thriller, starring Kevin Costner, Ryan Reynolds, Gary Oldman and Gal Gadot

programme.title: Cold in July (2014)
programme.desc: A small-town man is hailed as a hero after he shoots dead a burglar who had broken into his home. He begins to fear for his life when the thiefs father turns up seeking revenge, which is only the first in a series of events that plunge his simple life into chaos. Crime thriller based on Joe R Lansdales novel, starring Michael C Hall, Sam Shepard and Don Johnson

programme.title: Deathwatch (2002)
programme.desc: A platoon of British soldiers becomes lost in no-mans-land during the First World War, and strikes camp in an uncharted and seemingly deserted enemy trench. As strange things start to happen, the soldiers realise their hiding place is haunted by an evil supernatural force that makes them turn on each other. Horror, starring Jamie Bell, Hugo Speer, Matthew Rhys, Andy Serkis and Laurence Fox

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Ashleigh is rushed to St Georges by ambulance after twisting her leg while playing football. X-rays reveal that her femur is broken and she will need surgery. Meanwhile, three-year-old Lola visits AandE with her dad after having a seizure, and 91-year-old Betty arrives with severe chest pain. Doctors carry out a blood test in order to find out whether she is having a heart attack and will require life-saving surgery

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Emma and Jonathan fear that a truck driver is bleeding internally from pelvic injuries after a high-speed crash. Dr Zaheer and nurse Ebony are vigilant for heart failure in a 28-year-old woman whos having a severe asthma attack and struggling to breathe despite multiple medications, while Dr Scott expects the worst when a 74-year-old man, who already has lung disease, is pinned under the car he was working on at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-one-year-old cyclist Bill is brought to St Georges from Surrey after being hit by a car. He was not wearing a helmet, and doctors are concerned he may have sustained a serious head injury. Meanwhile, 93-year-old Amy arrives in AandE with her friend after a clothes airer fell on top of her while she was hanging out the washing. Plus, an emergency nurse practitioner looks after 78-year-old Samuel, who landed on his face after falling over some boxes

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Train driver Andy, 48, is rushed in after falling 12ft from a tree while cutting branches and landing on his feet, badly fracturing both ankles, and doctors are concerned the impact may have caused life-changing damage to critical nerves and blood vessels in his feet and legs. Angela, 59, has come to St Georges as her heart has been beating at over 150bpm for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Cardiologist Dr Aruns attempts to bring down her pulse using a powerful drug arent successful, so he decides to electrically shock her heart to reset it

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty and Briony May Williams embark on an epic journey through the Nordic region. Starting in the Viking fjords of west Norway, they take to the seas to uncover how cod farming could be part of the future. Travelling south through Swedens ancient landscape, they pay a special visit to a certain furniture store and learn just what makes a meatball so Swedish. They finish their journey in Finland, home to the happiest people in the world apparently, to find out what kind of food is putting a smile on their faces

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien come across a gramophone and a stow-away bed to restore. Meanwhile, Simon accidently puts his foot through a drum

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole decides that he needs to restore a forklift truck, while Simon OBrien gets all zen with a stone water feature

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Charing, Kent, where landlady Natalie Palmer hopes to show that her BandB, The Oak, is better than any of her guests establishments. Everything starts off well when a couple are delighted to have enough room for their yoga mats, but the rest of the party are unimpressed with the extractor fans

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the White Lady in Worstead, Norfolk, on their second night, where proprietor Dennis Gilligan tells his guests about a spooky presence that resides there. The guests get competitive in a round of clay shooting, and debate whether they believe in the existence of ghosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Cranleigh House BandB in Combe Martin, Devon, where former couple Katherine Armitage and Stewart Johnston offer alternative accommodation for those who enjoy yoga and are seeking spiritual enlightenment. They hope the group will send out energy for world peace and healing, but Mike and Denise question whether the whole thing is a joke

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Denise Mitchell welcome the contestants to Beaches BandB in Paignton, Devon, which only opened for business a few weeks ago. Fellow competitor Katherine puts the owners through their paces at breakfast when she asks for something off the menu, and the hosts are pleasantly surprised at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners come together for one last time to discover what they have been paid, and the identity of the winner. The Oak owner Natalie wants to know why some of her guests were not enthused by her extractor fans, but she herself receives aggression from Dennis over her criticism of the White Lady. Katherine and Stuart defend their vegetarian breakfast, and Mike and Denise deal with negative comments about their cereal selection

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Tanya Manock offers up a Mediterranean-themed menu as she kicks off a week of dinner parties at her home in Rochdale, Greater Manchester, where one of her guests - medium Dean Fox - stumbles upon a plethora of lingerie in the bedroom

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Food-lover Rod Tonge hosts the second dinner party in Rochdale, Greater Manchester, hoping his efforts will win him the £1,000 cash prize. However, his chances are low as he has already insulted fitness instructor Tanya Manock, and HR manager Claire Lemon does not have high hopes for his entertaining skills

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: HR manager Claire Lemon hopes to compensate for her imperfect cooking skills with her bubbly personality and superior hosting ability as she hosts on day three of the dinner-party challenge in Rochdale, Greater Manchester. But tension rises when Tanya barely touches the starter - or the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Psychic medium Dean Fox puts his cooking skills to the test during the fourth dinner party in Rochdale, Greater Manchester. His main course goes down well with his fellow diners, but his pudding jeopardises his bid to pick up the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the last night in Rochdale, Greater Manchester, and the turn of feisty mum Sadiya Hussein to host. The tension between Sadiya and Tanya threatens to reach boiling point, and the evening takes a curious turn when Sadiya decides to put psychic medium Dean Foxs clairvoyant powers to the test

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Shelley Guest House in Aberystwyth, where its husband-and-wife owners hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money by providing their guests with an old-school form of entertainment, some Spanish cuisine and a monumental continental breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests travel to the five-star Ixworth House in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, where hosts John and Sharyn Snell are quietly confident their establishment will impress. John reveals his hidden talents at dinner, but his performance at breakfast the next morning does not go down well with all of the fellow BandB owners

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In York, part-time panto dame Graham Smith runs the Georgian House and Mews, and takes his guests back in time with a Nordic test of strength. At supper, Hazel has romance on her mind, but the guests are left to fend for themselves at breakfast - until Graham makes a show-stopping appearance

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the George Hotel in Orton, Cumbria, for the fourth visit of the day. Owner Hazel McAleese organises a fishing trip as the afternoon activity, during which one of the guests decides to use the opportunity to give everyone a lesson in innuendo

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the contest reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the BandB owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The dynamic property duo catch up with two sets of house-hunters who wanted to make the switch from London life to family life. In 2016, Cara and Ben realised that in order to have the space they wanted theyd need to move out of the capital. Keen cyclist Ben discovered Bishops Stortford when he was out on a bike ride, and the couple moved into a rental property there so that they could get a feel for the town before they bought. With the surprise arrival of baby Max, and their rental lease about to end, they were desperate to buy a place of their own. Phil showed them just what they were looking for, and as fate would have it, just around the corner from their rental. Kirstie and Phil catch up with Cara and Ben to find that theyve expanded to a family of four and the house has had a serious makeover. In 2020, Tom and his Floridian wife Kaitlyn were still house sharing with Toms old schoolfriend in south London. Desperate to find their own pad to start a family in and even with a healthy budget of £450k, the couple had been struggling to find everything on their wish list: three bedrooms, character, lots of outside space for keen gardener Tom, and the American-style large open-plan living space that Kaitlyn was used to. Even with Kirstie and Phil onside, none of the properties they saw hit enough of their marks to make the couple want to offer, so Phil advised them to expand their search area further east into Kent. Now, Phils back to see how theyre getting on

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer travel to Cowbridge in Wales to help a couple who have a home that, on the surface, looks perfect - its big, beautiful and in a picturesque location. But a long list of gripes, including a dysfunctional layout, has made Amy long for pastures new. However, having inherited the property from Louiss grandmother, it holds a special place in his heart and he is not ready to give up on it just yet

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: Spring finally arrives in Swaledale and the Owens gear up for another busy lambing season - but there is still the task of putting the ancient hearth stone back in place in front of the fire. Amanda, Edith and Clemmie enjoy a picnic as builder Richard gets on with laying a stone floor on top of new cosy underfloor heating, while the kids collect frogspawn

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Five-year-old Isa is rushed to AandE after being hit by a car and trapped underneath it, and doctors suspect the impact may have caused serious internal damage, as well as significant head injuries. Meanwhile, 26-year-old Tom is treated after slicing through his leg with a circular saw, with medics fearing the blade has cut so deeply into the muscle tissue that it could starve his leg of blood. Plus, 85-year-old retired actor Donald comes to the hospital with pain in his bladder, and consultant Faheem is concerned there may be an infection

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A woman collapses in the street while out shopping and may have broken her hip, shes in excruciating pain, but the paramedics need to move her. A man threatens to take an overdose if the paramedics dont take him to hospital. Plus, a man recovering from spinal surgery has a suspected blood clot on his lung

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Two motorcyclists need specialist care, as the helicopter medics try to save the life of Pete, while Tom may have a serious spinal injury. Plus, a woman is kicked in the face by her horse. Documentary following the work of air ambulance crews

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Five-year-old Isa is rushed to AandE after being hit by a car and trapped underneath it, and doctors suspect the impact may have caused serious internal damage, as well as significant head injuries. Meanwhile, 26-year-old Tom is treated after slicing through his leg with a circular saw, with medics fearing the blade has cut so deeply into the muscle tissue that it could starve his leg of blood. Plus, 85-year-old retired actor Donald comes to the hospital with pain in his bladder, and consultant Faheem is concerned there may be an infection

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Ashleigh is rushed to St Georges by ambulance after twisting her leg while playing football. X-rays reveal that her femur is broken and she will need surgery. Meanwhile, three-year-old Lola visits AandE with her dad after having a seizure, and 91-year-old Betty arrives with severe chest pain. Doctors carry out a blood test in order to find out whether she is having a heart attack and will require life-saving surgery

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty and Matt Tebbutt embark on an extraordinary road trip through Americas Deep South. Starting on the Gulf Coast, in New Orleans, they discover how the shells from the huge number of oysters consumed locally could protect the coastline. Heading through Mississippi, Jimmy and Matt find out what makes southern sweet tea different from a British cuppa. In Alabama, Matt wants to know why they fry green tomatoes, and Jimmy uncovers exactly what grits are. Then its off to Tennessee to visit the Jack Daniels distillery and discover the secrets of sour mash. In Louisville, where the South meets the North, Jimmy and Matt learn about fast-food consistency at Kentucky Fried Chicken HQ

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Lancashire where Simon finds a 1980s glass cabinet he wants to turn into a modern grandfather clock. Henry picks up a drum kit and decides to relive his youth

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit an East Midlands reclamation yard, where they find a Russian motorbike and sidecar dating back to the Second World War and a 1970s fire surround

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Old Times Guesthouse in Ipswich, where mother-and-daughter duo Linda and Kelly Langdown hope a go-karting session will get the contest off to a flying start. However, a lack of breakfast options and corner-cutting on the guests orders do not go down very well

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit the Flower Pot in Sunbury-on-Thames on their second night, where owner Simon Bailey and French manager Pierre Cudon provide stylish continental-inspired accommodation, but the hosts are left puzzled by some of the feedback they receive the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the family run Dolphin Hotel in Exmouth, Devon, which has been a lifes work for hotelier Jo Knowles. On arrival, Pat and Nigel find a suspicious stain, before the guests put on their war faces for a game of paintball. Jo takes everyone to a floating restaurant for dinner, and the next morning she presents a huge spread for breakfast - but her diners are suspicious that it has been laid on specially for the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants stay at the Mariners Beachside BandB in Seaton, Devon, but are disappointed by the cleanliness of the property. They take part in a town-crying competition during the afternoon, and host Nigel feels under pressure to deliver his award-winning breakfast the next morning. Come feedback time, the owners discover not all their guests share the same opinion

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid, and confront their rivals. Simon Bailey and Pierre Cudon from the Flower Pot feel the feedback left by Nigel and Pat Booth is a step too far, while the Mariners BandB owners hit back at the mens opinion of their establishments cleanliness. Linda and Kelly Langdown of the Old Times Guest House question the rating of their facilities, while the Dolphin Hotels Jo Knowles has a confession to make regarding her hosting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Make-up artist Jules Osmany hosts the first of the weeks dinner parties in Northamptonshire, and hopes her Indian-Moroccan fusion menu and laid-back attitude will win her the £1,000 prize. Joining her are tomboy Lauren Oxlade, stay-at-home mum Stephanie Reeder, MD Carl Johnson and funeral service manager Peter Pickering

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Funeral service manager Peter Pickering hosts the second dinner party in Northamptonshire, hoping his traditional approach will win him the £1,000 cash prize. However, one guest does not like bread and butter pudding, and Stephanie is horrified by Juless shocking revelation

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: As the third party from Northamptonshire gets under way, stay-at-home mum Stephanie Reeders nerves are evident as she plans to serve classic fish and chips, while offering a glamorous clothes-swapping session for entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business planning manager Lauren Oxlade is the penultimate host in Northamptonshire. She reveals herself to be the dark horse of the competition when she invites a few surprising friends along to the party, and impresses with her organisational skills and passionate cooking style

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Last to try his hand in Northamptonshire is managing director and proud northerner Carl Johnson, with a menu that includes gammon cooked in two litres of cola. Stephanie and Lauren are treated to a glimpse of the host in all his glory when they see what he has hanging above his bed - but it remains to be seen what the guests will make of his lumpy chocolate mousse

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Angel Inn in Wangford, Suffolk, where husband-and-wife owners Peter and Christine hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money. However, a self-service breakfast fails to impress the guests, and Christine struggles to keep her cool as confusion reigns in the kitchen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second night of the competition moves to Moaps Farm in Dane Hill, East Sussex, where Lesley Miller hopes her guests will be charmed by her laid-back attitude. On arrival, the group is wowed by the view, but at breakfast the hosts relaxed approach leads to disaster and some of her fellow BandB owners are forced to help out with the service

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From Jabajak in Carmarthenshire, Wales, where sisters Lorraine Lloyd and Amanda Stuart-Robson host in their vineyard and restaurant BandB. The guests are stunned by the surroundings, and businessman Les Woollends and his head chef Lesz Zajac are convinced the sister act have the wow factor

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Les Woollends and his head chef Lesz Zajak welcome the contestants to the Clarendon Royal Hotel in Gravesend, Kent. The guests are dazzled on arrival, but Lesley Miller believes the champagne, truffles and fruit bowl are a ploy to win her over. The quality of the food gets good reviews at breakfast, although the guests poke fun at the crockery, and at feedback time criticism comes from an unexpected source and leaves the owner reconsidering his views of his rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the week reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the BandB owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer take two couples house-hunting in south Wales. Chris and Laura want a slice of the countryside with dreams of a vegetable patch in a huge garden for their one-year-old son Jack to play in but when the perfect place arises reality brings them down from cloud nine. Bob and Lara want a three-to-four bed family home in the city and parking is a must but Phil struggles to tick all the boxes in the competitive Cardiff housing market where theyve already been outbid 10 times

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Lincoln to help a couple end the five-year debate over their two-bedroom bungalow. Eric has never been a fan of their homes dysfunctional layout and now they have had a baby, and also have Erics two teenage boys staying over regularly, there is just not enough room for all five of them. Carly, however, is adamant that she will not move away from her family, who live nearby, and believes an extension will give them the space they need

programme.title: Bill Baileys Australian Adventure

But nothing could prepare him for the unforgettable experience of swimming alongside whale sharks

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Tinselworm

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Fifty-nine-year-old Charulata is rushed to AandE after collapsing at home with signs of a stroke. She has a history of strokes, diabetes, and is awaiting a heart bypass, so doctors send her for a CT scan to find out what has happened. Twenty-eight-year-old carpenter Luke - who has epilepsy - arrives after cutting his finger at work. Although his girlfriend Stacy says it looks like a paper cut, he is worried it may trigger a seizure. Meanwhile, 75-year-old Anne comes to St Georges after falling and hurting her arm on holiday

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-one-year-old cyclist Bill is brought to St Georges from Surrey after being hit by a car. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Train driver Andy, 48, is rushed in after falling 12ft from a tree while cutting branches and landing on his feet, badly fracturing both ankles, and doctors are concerned the impact may have caused life-changing damage to critical nerves and blood vessels in his feet and legs. Angela, 59, has come to St Georges as her heart has been beating at over 150bpm for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Cardiologist Dr Aruns attempts to bring down her pulse using a powerful drug arent successful, so he decides to electrically shock her heart to reset it

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty and Briony May Williams embark on an epic journey through the Nordic region. Starting in the Viking fjords of west Norway, they take to the seas to uncover how cod farming could be part of the future. Travelling south through Swedens ancient landscape, they pay a special visit to a certain furniture store and learn just what makes a meatball so Swedish. They finish their journey in Finland, home to the happiest people in the world apparently, to find out what kind of food is putting a smile on their faces

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien come across a gramophone and a stow-away bed to restore. Meanwhile, Simon accidently puts his foot through a drum

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The dynamic property duo catch up with two sets of house-hunters who wanted to make the switch from London life to family life. In 2016, Cara and Ben realised that in order to have the space they wanted theyd need to move out of the capital. Keen cyclist Ben discovered Bishops Stortford when he was out on a bike ride, and the couple moved into a rental property there so that they could get a feel for the town before they bought. With the surprise arrival of baby Max, and their rental lease about to end, they were desperate to buy a place of their own. Phil showed them just what they were looking for, and as fate would have it, just around the corner from their rental. Kirstie and Phil catch up with Cara and Ben to find that theyve expanded to a family of four and the house has had a serious makeover. In 2020, Tom and his Floridian wife Kaitlyn were still house sharing with Toms old schoolfriend in south London. Desperate to find their own pad to start a family in and even with a healthy budget of £450k, the couple had been struggling to find everything on their wish list: three bedrooms, character, lots of outside space for keen gardener Tom, and the American-style large open-plan living space that Kaitlyn was used to. Even with Kirstie and Phil onside, none of the properties they saw hit enough of their marks to make the couple want to offer, so Phil advised them to expand their search area further east into Kent. Now, Phils back to see how theyre getting on

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: In 1592, Elizabeth I visited Sudeley Castle in the Cotswolds for a three-day party commemorating the nations victory over the Spanish Armada. Here, Raksha Dave, Alex Langlands and assorted volunteers and archaeologists hunt for a lost garden planted as part of the celebrations, while there is also a visit to Kenilworth Castle to investigate an Elizabethan garden still in full bloom today. Plus, a look at how the gardens Tudor owner, Robert Dudley transformed his estate to win favour with his Queen

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Peter Mason from Herefordshire brings an old-fashioned ice cream maker into the Repair Shop. Once belonging to his beloved Granny Ethel, Peter hopes metal craftsman Dom can bring the sentimental kitchen curiosity back to life. David Burville takes on the challenge of restoring a Spanish barrel organ known as an organillo. Owner Carolina Urraca is hoping David can breathe new life into the instrument she loved to play when growing up with her grandmother in Spain. Audio specialist tackles the repair of Lorraine McCourts portable record player from the 1950s. Originally a gift from her father to her mother when they were courting, the precious momento brings back memories of Lorraines parents dancing to Nat King Cole. Finally, Malcom Jordan from Chippenham brings in a 65 year-old leather document case for Susie Fletcher to repair

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Ishy Khan and Natasha Raskin Sharp - Day 1
programme.desc: Antiques experts Natasha Raskin Sharp and Ishy Khan point their classic car to Northumberland in search of profit making collectables. Candelabra and militaria go under the gavel

programme.sub-title: Ishy Khan and Natasha Raskin Sharp - Day 2
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp finds a satirical Georgian caricature in Whitby, while Ishy Khan is feeling romantic in Scarborough and buys a dainty Victorian love heart watch key - but falls properly head-over-heels for some Persian salt bags and a glass terrarium

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell tell more stories of people desperate to find missing family and answer questions that have haunted entire lives, beginning with two men searching for the truth about their beginnings. programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell meet Sara Hathaway who, after losing her adoptive mother and older brother in the space of just a year, is desperate to find her birth family. programme.sub-title: Ishy Khan and Natasha Raskin Sharp - Day 3
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Ishy Khan head to East Yorkshire, where Ishy scoops up a glass terrier inkwell, an antique prayer mat and coos over a French Art Nouveau hand mirror

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Ishy Khan and Natasha Raskin Sharp - Day 4
programme.desc: Ishy Khan and Natasha Raskin Sharp peruse the antiques shops of West Yorkshire, picking up items including an Art Nouveau charger, a pair of jugs and a Robert Mouseman Thompson cheeseboard. Natasha trips the light fantastic in Huddersfield, where she learns about the history of Bhangra and gets a masterclass in one of the worlds oldest folk dances. The pair then head to Bristol for their penultimate auction

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell report on two more cases. More than 40 years ago, Caroline Kinsey was pregnant, alone and unable to provide the kind of family and upbringing she believed all children deserved. Burdened by her heart-breaking decision to give her son up for adoption, Caroline longs to find him, to hear that he did have a happy childhood, and to know whether he can forgive her after all these years. Raised as an only child, Paul McFarlanes beloved mother died when he was nine, but years later, a single piece of paper threw all his assumptions about his small family into question

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell follow the stories of two more people. Rachel Burch grew up in a white family and stood out in the small, West Sussex village where they lived, and is searching for her Jamaica-born birth father. Sue Davis is on the hunt for the half-brother her mother gave up for adoption after his American serviceman father went home and off the radar following Second World War

programme.desc: In Dom Littlewoods stylish seaside pad, Angus finds a rare guitar. Then, he checks out 1950s treasures at soap star Lisa Georges home

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: EastEnders actor Nitin Ganatra (Masood Ahmed) moved to England from Kenya when he was just three years old. Now he has questions about his identity, wanting to know not only why his family left, but also why they emigrated to Africa from India in the first place. The trail leads him to his ancestral home in Gujarat, but along the way he makes an emotional discovery about his mothers relatives

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?

programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Ishy Khan head to East Yorkshire, where Ishy scoops up a glass terrier inkwell, an antique prayer mat and coos over a French Art Nouveau hand mirror

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Ishy Khan and Natasha Raskin Sharp - Day 4
programme.desc: Ishy Khan and Natasha Raskin Sharp peruse the antiques shops of West Yorkshire, picking up items including an Art Nouveau charger, a pair of jugs and a Robert Mouseman Thompson cheeseboard. Natasha trips the light fantastic in Huddersfield, where she learns about the history of Bhangra and gets a masterclass in one of the worlds oldest folk dances. The pair then head to Bristol for their penultimate auction

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell report on two more cases. More than 40 years ago, Caroline Kinsey was pregnant, alone and unable to provide the kind of family and upbringing she believed all children deserved. Burdened by her heart-breaking decision to give her son up for adoption, Caroline longs to find him, to hear that he did have a happy childhood, and to know whether he can forgive her after all these years. Raised as an only child, Paul McFarlanes beloved mother died when he was nine, but years later, a single piece of paper threw all his assumptions about his small family into question

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell follow the stories of two more people. Rachel Burch grew up in a white family and stood out in the small, West Sussex village where they lived, and is searching for her Jamaica-born birth father. Sue Davis is on the hunt for the half-brother her mother gave up for adoption after his American serviceman father went home and off the radar following Second World War

programme.title: Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: In Dom Littlewoods stylish seaside pad, Angus finds a rare guitar. Then, he checks out 1950s treasures at soap star Lisa Georges home

programme.title: Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus unearths some family fortunes at comedy legend Les Dennis home. Then, he checks out a selection of movie memorabilia at Sherrie Hewsons house

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: EastEnders actor Nitin Ganatra (Masood Ahmed) moved to England from Kenya when he was just three years old. Now he has questions about his identity, wanting to know not only why his family left, but also why they emigrated to Africa from India in the first place. The trail leads him to his ancestral home in Gujarat, but along the way he makes an emotional discovery about his mothers relatives

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Pixie Lott sets out to confirm the family story that she has Italian ancestry from Verona. However, her genealogy search takes her to a tale of poverty and hardship in London, and a harrowing and surprising experience in the First World War

programme.title: You Will Die in Prison
programme.desc: Chronicling the 222-day ordeal of Bernard Phelan, an Irish-French citizen wrongfully taken hostage in Mashhad, Iran, in October 2022. The film opens with Phelans capture outside the Imam Reza mosque, thrusting viewers into his experience inside the notorious Satans Block of Mashhad prison. This documentary portrays Phelans struggle for survival, his relentless defiance against his captors, and the critical diplomatic efforts that secured his release on humanitarian grounds in May 2023

programme.title: You Will Die in Prison
programme.desc: Chronicling the 222-day ordeal of Bernard Phelan, an Irish-French citizen wrongfully taken hostage in Mashhad, Iran, in October 2022. The film opens with Phelans capture outside the Imam Reza mosque, thrusting viewers into his experience inside the notorious Satans Block of Mashhad prison. This documentary portrays Phelans struggle for survival, his relentless defiance against his captors, and the critical diplomatic efforts that secured his release on humanitarian grounds in May 2023

programme.title: Secrets and Spies: A Nuclear Game
programme.desc: Documenting the tensions between East and West, which led to a spying game and an arms race that brought the world to the brink of nuclear war. Featuring archive interviews with KGB spy Oleg Gordievsky, who turned double-agent and began working for the British. Plus, a look at the unpublished letters of Michael Bettaney and interviews with former aides to Margaret Thatcher and Ronald Reagan

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The revival sitcom spin-off from Cheers welcomes back uptight radio psychiatrist Frasier Crane (Kelsey Grammer) to Boston for 10 more episodes of familial strife with his son Freddy (Jack Cutmore-Scott) and nephew David (Anders Keith). During the second season, Frasier returns to his old stomping ground at KACL radio station in Seattle. He is reunited with Bob Bulldog Briscoe (Dan Butler), Gil Chesterton (Edward Hibbert) and his ferocious agent, Bebe Glazer (Harriet Sansom Harris)

programme.title: SAS Rogue Heroes
programme.desc: As Reg Seekings struggles to cope, he strikes up a friendship with a young Italian boy which ends in yet more horror

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: Argentinian recruitment executive Luciana from Rathmines, who claims to have a personality like sweet and sour chicken, spices it up with security expert and former soldier Darragh from Balbriggan. Wexford physiotherapist Carl is looking for an emotional connection - and may have found it with outgoing Eoin from Stoneybatter who has bigger hands than anyone hes ever met. Nurse Fiona is paired with former nurse Tom, and Toronto-born Mariah meets musician Conor, whose fear of blind dates is matched only by an ability to charm women by playing guitar

programme.title: A Good Girls Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, Pip seeks out a calamity party with hopes of tracking down the drug dealer Max told her about. Ravi is sceptical about the plan but shes determined to see it through with the help of Cara and Lauren

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers take on three challenges exploring authentic Mexican bakes, as they put their twist on the classic sweet bread pan dulce for the Signature, tackle a Mexican street food staple in the Technical, and make their own showstopping version of the milk-soaked tres leches cake. Which bakers will impress Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood enough to keep their place in the tent, and who will be heading home? Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present

programme.title: Scotlands Home of the Year
programme.desc: Anna Campbell-Jones, Banjo Beale and Michael Angus judge three properties in the central region, beginning with the Skinny House, a novel new build in Bridge of Allan with a sleek and contemporary design. Moving on, they visit a B-listed former manse in Auchterarder, dating back to the late 1840s, and a traditional cottage in Dunblane

programme.title: Scotlands Home of the Year
programme.desc: Judges Anna Campbell Jones, Michael Angus and Banjo Beale head south, paying a visit to two properties in Dumfries and Galloway - a new build eco house and a former milking barn with contemporary extension. They also assess an historic renovation on the outskirts of Peebles, thought to date back to the 16th century

When Sophie Honeywell mysteriously inherits a house on the island, its the fresh start shes been craving, despite the unwelcome reception she receives on arrival. Starring Teresa Palmer and Miranda Richardson

programme.title: The Split
programme.desc: First in a two-part special of the legal drama, with Nicola Walker and Stephen Mangan, and guest starring Toby Stephens. Hannah Defoe and her family have gathered for a wedding at a vineyard in Catalonias wine region. Over the course of one weekend, they have to contend with break-ups, reunions, the ghosts of Hannahs past, and the possibility of a fresh start

programme.title: Bad Nanny
programme.desc: Part two of two. How fraudster Samantha Cookes deception reached new heights as she entered the lives of Lorraine, Lynn and Hillery, posing as a therapist for children with additional needs. Under the alias Lucy Fitzwilliams, she earned their trust seeking donations for a womens refuge. She then reinvented herself once more as a terminally ill author in Co Kerry, asking for money for surgery in LA. But when some of her victims discovered the truth thanks to a TikTok video, the vulnerable families banded together and turned detective to expose the truth, ultimately leading to Samanthas dramatic downfall and conviction in 2025

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Glasgow, one of his favourite cities, to reveal unusual and often hidden sights and sounds overlooked by the public. Starting at the Necropolis, he travels to the worlds oldest music hall before enjoying the views from a city-centre landmark. He also finds the time to take tea with a film star

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Life in the Devon fishing port of Brixham. Spring is in the air, and the town is a hive of activity as skippers return their pleasure yachts to the water after winter in the dry dock, while the pressure is on for Brixham to look its best for the arrival of Princess Anne, who will officially open the new £20million fish market, and the start of the summer season

programme.title: Fish Town

programme.title: Deadwood

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: Strange Darling (2023)
programme.desc: A twisted one-night stand devolves into a serial killers vicious killing spree and a cat-and-mouse chase. Writer/director JT Mollners thriller, starring Willa Fitzgerald, Kyle Gallner, Madisen Beaty and Barbara Hershey

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside towns tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chiefs efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielbergs blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: Jaws 2 (1978)
programme.desc: The seaside resort of Amity is terrorised once again by a man-eating great white shark. While police chief Brody struggles to alert the townsfolk to the magnitude of the danger, a group of teenagers - including Brodys two sons - is adrift at sea in waters hunted by the shark. Director Jeannot Szwarcs thriller sequel, starring Roy Scheider, Lorraine Gary and Murray Hamilton, with John Williams once more providing the acclaimed score

programme.title: The Secret of Marrowbone (2017)
programme.desc: A young man and his three siblings have kept the death of their beloved mother secret in order to remain together. However, they are plagued by a sinister presence in their sprawling manor. Writer/director Sergio G Sanchezs horror, starring George MacKay, Anya Taylor-Joy and Charlie Heaton

programme.title: Afraid (2024)
programme.desc: Computer engineering company executive Curtis is coerced into testing a new digital assistant named AIA to secure a lucrative business contract with two tech geniuses. At first, the omnipresent artificial intelligence simplifies day-to-day life. However, AIA becomes dangerously protective of the clan. Writer/director Chris Weitzs sci-fi horror, starring John Cho, Katherine Waterston and Keith Carradine

programme.title: The Watched (2024)
programme.desc: Mina, a 28-year old artist, gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. When Mina finds shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers that are stalked by mysterious creatures each night. Horror, starring Dakota Fanning, Georgina Campbell and Olwen Fouere

programme.title: Salems Lot (2024)
programme.desc: A writer attempts to destroy vampires in a small American town. Horror based on Stephen Kings novel of the same name, starring Lewis Pullman, Makenzie Leigh, Jordan Preston Carter and Alfre Woodard

programme.title: The Damned (2024)
programme.desc: A 19th-century widow must make an unimaginable choice when, during a cruel winter, a foreign ship sinks off the coast of her fishing village. Horror mystery, starring Odessa Young, Joe Cole, Siobhan Finneran and Rory McCann

programme.title: Out of Darkness (2022)
programme.desc: In the Stone Age, a gang of early humans face a mystical being hellbent on hunting them down. Prehistoric horror, starring Iola Evans and Arno Luning. The dialogue is in a specially contructed language and features subtitles

programme.title: Beast of War (2025)
programme.desc: A group of soldiers get stranded on a raft in the middle of the ocean after their ship is sunk, and must battle a great white shark. Writer/director Kiah Roache-Turners horror thriller, starring Mark Coles Smith and Joel Nankervis

Director Jeannot Szwarcs thriller sequel, starring Roy Scheider, Lorraine Gary and Murray Hamilton, with John Williams once more providing the acclaimed score

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger (2025)
programme.desc: Bob Garbinger is the money-oriented CEO of a factory that is pumping out dangerous chemicals into the close-knit community of St Romas Villa. Residents are poisoned by toxins, including widowed janitor Winston Gooze, who works at the factory and learns he has an incurable brain condition. Whistleblower JJ shares devastating information about the factorys reckless disregard for public safety and Winston undergoes a physical transformation in response to exposure to toxic ooze. He takes on the form of a hideously deformed vigilante and wreaks havoc on Bob and his brother Fritz. Comedy horror, starring Peter Dinklage, Kevin Bacon and Taylour Paige

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: The Cinema List: Fear Seekers
programme.desc: This Cinema List is for fear seekers. From The Shining and Weapons to Jaws, brace yourself for relentless tension and terrifying moments that keep you on the edge of your seat

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer (2025)
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: Sick (2022)
programme.desc: Due to the pandemic, Parker and her best friend decide to quarantine at the family lake house alone - or so they think. Horror, starring Gideon Adlon, Bethlehem Million and Dylan Spradberry

programme.title: Hannibal (2001)
programme.desc: Fugitive serial killer Dr Hannibal Lecter has gone into hiding as an academic in Italy, but a disfigured victim is determined to find him and inflict a gruesome revenge. FBI agent Clarice Starling is once again drawn into the doctors deadly orbit as she finds herself being used as bait for the avengers trap. Ridley Scotts thriller sequel, starring Anthony Hopkins, Julianne Moore, Gary Oldman and Ray Liotta

programme.title: The Exorcist (1973)
programme.desc: A girl is possessed by a formidable demonic entity that resists all efforts at freeing her from its grasp. In desperation, the childs mother appeals for help from a local priest and a veteran exorcist, but succeeding in this nightmarish contest of wills threatens the lives of both men. William Friedkins horror, starring Linda Blair, Jason Miller, Ellen Burstyn, Max von Sydow and Lee J Cobb

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: Until Dawn (2025)
programme.desc: A year after their friend disappeared, a group find themselves trapped in a time loop, where they are hunted and killed unless they survive until dawn. Video game-inspired horror, starring Ella Rubin, Michael Cimino and Odessa Azion

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Eddington (2025)
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025)
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Regretting You (2025)
programme.desc: A mother and daughter grapple with whats left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal and forces them to rediscover themselves. Romantic comedy drama, starring Allison Williams, Mckenna Grace and Dave Franco

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: Eddington (2025)
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025)
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025)
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: The Movies
programme.sub-title: The Golden Age of Cinema - Part One
programme.desc: The history of cinema, told through interviews and analysis from some of its greatest directors and talents. The first of a two-part examination of its so-called golden age begins in the 1930s, as talking pictures take hold in Hollywood

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the American actor, who starred in movies including The Dirty Dozen, Point Blank and Paint Your Wagon and won an Oscar for Cat Ballou

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the Academy Award-winning Francis Ford Coppola, whose films include The Godfather franchise and Apocalypse Now

programme.title: Chimp Crazy
programme.desc: A look at the bonds between pet chimpanzees and their owners,as well as the risks humans take when they raise these animals as members of their families and the risks to the welfare of the animals themselves. The first edition features nurse-turned-exotic animal broker Tonia Haddix as she fights to retain custody of seven chimpanzees bred for entertainment

programme.title: JFK: Destiny Betrayed
programme.desc: Oliver Stones four-part documentary exploring the Kennedy assassination, and questioning the actions of the Presidents political enemies

programme.title: The Nineties
programme.desc: A look at Bill Clintons controversial presidency, from his accomplishments in office to the Monica Lewinsky sex scandal that led to his impeachment

programme.title: Be Water
programme.desc: A look at Bruce Lees time in Hong Kong making four films, exploring questions of identity and representation through rare archive, intimate interviews, and Lees writings

programme.title: McEnroe
programme.desc: Set over the course of one night in New York, this documentary invites John McEnroe to reflect on his life and career. McEnroes children and wife Patty Smyth offer their personal insights, enriched with intimate home video footage and previously unseen archive material from big matches

programme.title: Digging for Britain

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the north Norfolk coast through one of the least developed spots in Britain, finding out how the area maintained its rural, remote identity despite the dynamic industrial changes of the Victorian age. From the arrival of Bertie, Prince of Wales at Sandringham House to the opening of Cromer Pier, Tonys four-day walk sees him learn about key periods in the countys history. He explores prime shooting estates, purpose-built seaside resorts, salt marshes and disused railway lines as he discovers how powerful landowners were able to control development and even shape the railways to suit their needs

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britains most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontës, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Brontë Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Brontë hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their fathers parsonage home

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII
programme.desc: In September 1939 German forces invaded Poland as four Luftwaffe bomber groups attacked Warsaw. By September 6, the citys anti-aircraft defences had been reduced to a few guns and much of the Polish capital was in ruins. The bomber aircraft dominated the skies throughout the rest of the Second World War as fleets stood ready on the airfields of every combatant nation

programme.title: Witches of Essex
programme.desc: Henry VIIIs law against witches in 1542 led to thousands of women being persecuted and many burned at the stake. New investigative techniques and historical records are to re-examine the fates of women accused of witchcraft during 16th and 17th-century witch trials in Essex. Rylan and Alice Roberts explores the events, lives, and alleged crimes of those accused, often bringing the stories to life through scripted drama and featuring expert testimony from historians and psychologists

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Diving into the deep as the legendary Kraken emerges from myth and mystery, terrifying sailors and baffling scientists for centuries

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the north Norfolk coast through one of the least developed spots in Britain, finding out how the area maintained its rural, remote identity despite the dynamic industrial changes of the Victorian age. From the arrival of Bertie, Prince of Wales at Sandringham House to the opening of Cromer Pier, Tonys four-day walk sees him learn about key periods in the countys history. He explores prime shooting estates, purpose-built seaside resorts, salt marshes and disused railway lines as he discovers how powerful landowners were able to control development and even shape the railways to suit their needs

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britains most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontës, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Brontë Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Brontë hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their fathers parsonage home

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson visits the Cairngorms National Park to discover how Queen Victoria and Prince Albert helped shape Scottish traditions and imagery, such as tartan, bagpipes and caber-tossing. Starting in Pitlochry, he traverses the Killiecrankie Pass, where the Jacobites won the Battle of Killiecrankie, and ends his trek at Balmoral and the fantasy castle Albert built as his and Victorias Highland escape

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads to the south-west corner of Wales and one of Britains finest coastal paths to find out why Pembrokeshire feels so English, even though its more than 100 miles from the border. With its numerous castles and a fine cathedral, there are sure signs the Normans stamped their mark over the area. Tonys four-day walk traces the story of their conquest of the county, which he discovers was very different from the knockout victory at Hastings, involving a long, fiercely fought struggle

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie embark on a thrilling journey across the country in search of hidden gems and forgotten treasures. programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Officers make a disturbing discovery in a Chinese students bag, and a devious passenger will try anything to get past immigration

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. Sci-fi comedy, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Linda Fiorentino, Rip Torn and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.title: Men in Black II (2002)
programme.desc: Agent J investigates the unauthorised landing of a spacecraft and discovers a malevolent alien disguised as a lingerie model is on the verge of destroying humanity. His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. Sci-fi comedy, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Linda Fiorentino, Rip Torn and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.title: Men in Black II (2002)
programme.desc: Agent J investigates the unauthorised landing of a spacecraft and discovers a malevolent alien disguised as a lingerie model is on the verge of destroying humanity. His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub
